methods.description: The genomes of each bacterial strain were assembled using assembly programs and annotated for further analysis.

steps.description: The genomes of each bacterial strain were assembled using either of the assembly programs Falcon version 1.7.5 or Canu version 1.3.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble bacterial genomes using Falcon or Canu

methods.description: A phylotaxonomic analysis was performed for each strain independently to determine taxonomic classification.

steps.description: A phylotaxonomic analysis was performed for each strain independently using PhyloPhlAn version 0.99.

methods.description: The presence of prophages in each genome was determined using the phage search tool PHASTER.

steps.description: The presence of prophages in each genome was determined using the phage search tool PHASTER.

methods.description: The presence of genes involved in biotic-related interactions was ascertained using Pathway Tools and antiSMASH, as well as manual searches.

steps.description: The presence of genes involved in biotic-related interactions was ascertained using both Pathway Tools version 20.5/21.0 and antiSMASH version 3.0.5 with all optional analyses turned on.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze biotic interaction genes using Pathway Tools and antiSMASH

steps.description: Manual searches of each strain's annotation.
steps.searchable_summary: perform manual searches for biotic interaction genes
